mapper.sql: SECKILL_NAME, START_TIME, END_TIME, SECKILL_MEMO, SECKILL_STATE, ADD_TIME, SECKILL_ID
mapper.update:
update
set SECKILL_NAME = #{SECKILL_NAME}, START_TIME = #{START_TIME}, END_TIME = #{END_TIME}, SECKILL_MEMO = #{SECKILL_MEMO}, SECKILL_STATE = #{SECKILL_STATE}, ADD_TIME = #{ADD_TIME}, SECKILL_ID = SECKILL_ID where SECKILL_ID = #{SECKILL_ID}
mapper.select: select count(1) from SHOP_SECKILL left join SHOP_SECKILLGOODS on SHOP_SECKILL.SECKILL_ID=SHOP_SECKILLGOODS.SECKILL_ID where 1 = 1 and date_format(NOW(), '%H:%i:%S') > date_format(str_to_date(SHOP_SECKILL.START_TIME, '%H:%i:%S'),'%H:%i:%S') and date_format(str_to_date(SHOP_SECKILL.END_TIME, '%H:%i:%S'),'%H:%i:%S') > date_format(NOW(), '%H:%i:%S') and SHOP_SECKILLGOODS.GOODS_NUM >#{GOODS_USENUM} and SHOP_SECKILLGOODS.GOODS_ID = #{GOODS_ID} and SHOP_SECKILL.SECKILL_STATE=1

select SECKILL_NAME, START_TIME, END_TIME, SECKILL_MEMO, SECKILL_STATE, ADD_TIME, SECKILL_ID, case when date_format(NOW(), '%H:%i:%S')>date_format(str_to_date(START_TIME, '%H:%i:%S'),'%H:%i:%S') then (TIME_TO_SEC(END_TIME) - TIME_TO_SEC(date_format(NOW(), '%H:%i:%S'))) else TIME_TO_SEC(START_TIME)-TIME_TO_SEC(date_format(NOW(), '%H:%i:%S')) end as COUNTDOWN , case when date_format(NOW(), '%H:%i:%S')>date_format(str_to_date(START_TIME, '%H:%i:%S'),'%H:%i:%S') then 0 else 1 end as ISNOTSTART from SHOP_SECKILL where 1=1 and date_format(str_to_date(END_TIME, '%H:%i:%S'),'%H:%i:%S') > date_format(NOW(), '%H:%i:%S') and SECKILL_STATE= 1 order by str_to_date(START_TIME, '%H:%i:%S')
